title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
